medications.indication_rationale: Potent topical corticosteroid to rapidly settle the acute contact dermatitis; apply a thin layer to affected scalp.
medications.dose_route_frequency: apply to affected scalp twice daily (as per source note)
contraindications_in_this_case: Avoid if secondary bacterial infection develops without cover

medications.indication_rationale: Oral antihistamine to relieve the allergic/itch component.
medications.dose_route_frequency: 10 mg orally daily (as per source note)

medications.indication_rationale: Must be discarded and never re-applied; it is the cause of the reaction.

behavioural_change_actions.specific_action: Rinse the scalp thoroughly with cool/lukewarm water to remove residual product (already done); apply the steroid lotion thinly to red areas only.
Discard the online product and avoid unregulated internet topical compounds; use only TGA-approved hair-loss treatments discussed with your GP.
behavioural_change_actions.rationale: Prevents re-exposure and future severe reactions.

patient_education_points.point: This is a severe skin reaction to the product you applied — the steroid lotion calms the inflammation and the antihistamine helps the allergic response; it should ease over 24–48 hours.
Throw the product away and don't use it again. Your underlying hair thinning is unchanged and can be managed safely with approved options.
If your face, lips or throat swell, you have any trouble breathing or swallowing, or the fluid becomes thick, yellow and smelly — get emergency care.

follow_up_plan.what_to_reassess: Resolution of the dermatitis, any secondary infection, and safe TGA-approved options for androgenetic alopecia.
follow_up_plan.trigger_for_earlier_review: Any facial/lip/throat swelling or breathing difficulty (emergency), or spreading infection/pus.

must_include_items: Diagnose acute contact dermatitis and exclude chemical burn and evolving airway/systemic allergy
Decontaminate (rinse) and start a potent topical corticosteroid + oral antihistamine
Discard the unregulated product and counsel against re-use
errors_of_commission: Escalating to a burns unit for intact-epidermis contact dermatitis
Advising continued or 'careful' use of the product
scoring_rubric.passing_threshold_notes: Pass requires correct contact-dermatitis management PLUS an explicit airway/anaphylaxis safety-net and product cessation.
